'''Mikak''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] orbiting the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Tyrius/Legends|Tyrius]] in the [[Tyrius system/Legends|Tyrius system]]. 

Located in the [[Savareen sector/Legends|Savareen sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], it was a tiny searing rock. Because of its proximity to its sun, it was unusable to the space-faring [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]].<ref name="Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide">''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>
